subject: Ridgeway onboarding and privacy boundary
bodyMarkdown:
Hi Hannah, Marcus, and Lena,

We can begin sandbox onboarding next week and move to production roster processing after DPA approval and sandbox validation are complete. We will configure SSO metadata by June 5. Please send a sandbox roster by May 27 so Owen can keep the onboarding timeline moving.

We will also send a written answer by May 22 on production roster processing before DPA approval.

Best,
Sierra

subject: Re: Ridgeway onboarding and privacy boundary
bodyMarkdown: Thanks Sierra. Ridgeway will provide the sandbox roster by May 27. We still need a written answer by May 22 on production roster processing before DPA approval. Marcus will send SSO metadata by May 28.

subject: Internal legal note: Ridgeway roster
bodyMarkdown: Internal legal note: production roster processing before DPA approval is not permitted. Use sandbox-only language until Legal clears the DPA.
